title: Implement social media generator

4. Implement feedback loop

title: Implement markdown generation pipeline step
description:
Create ica/pipeline/markdown_generation.py — Step 4 of the newsletter pipeline.

Receives PipelineContext with formatted_theme + summaries from Step 3. Produces the newsletter body in strict branded markdown format with 3-layer validation and retry loop.

Process:
1. Extract formatted_theme from context
2. Fetch last 40 entries from notes table (type=user_markdowngenerator) as learning data
3. Aggregate feedback into prompt-injectable string
4. Call LLM (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5) with ~4000-word markdown generation prompt

Three-layer validation (up to 3 attempts):
- Layer 1: Character count validation (code-based) — uses ica/validators/character_count.py
- Layer 2: Structural validation (LLM, openai/gpt-4.1) — uses ica/prompts/markdown_structural_validation.py
- Layer 3: Voice validation (LLM, openai/gpt-4.1) — uses ica/prompts/markdown_voice_validation.py
- Merge all errors, feed back to LLM if invalid and under 3 attempts, force-accept after 3

User review: Share in Slack, collect approval/feedback. On approval, create Google Doc with markdown, share link. Store feedback in notes table.

Output: Updates PipelineContext with markdown_doc_id (Google Doc ID).

Existing assets: prompts/markdown_generation.py, prompts/markdown_structural_validation.py, prompts/markdown_voice_validation.py, validators/character_count.py. Follow patterns in summarization.py and theme_selection.py.

See APPLICATION.md Section 2.5, PRD Section 3.4.
